# Ozaia
> A quiet presence for every phase of a woman's life.

## About
Ozaia is a wellness presence for women, covering every life phase from adolescence through post-menopause. Founded by Sebastien Assohou, holistic health practitioner and educator, EB-1 recognized in the United States. Ozaia is rooted in preventive presence: she acts on signals before a woman has to ask. Built on the philosophy that being understood before having to explain is itself a form of care.

## Website
- Homepage: https://ozaia.app
- Origin story: https://ozaia.app/origin
- Full presentation: https://ozaia.app/pitch
- Founder letters: https://ozaia.app/letters

- Silent Anxiety in Teenage Girls: https://ozaia.app/articles/silent-anxiety-teenage-girls
- Silent Anxiety During Pregnancy: https://ozaia.app/articles/silent-anxiety-pregnancy

- Anxiety After Menopause: https://ozaia.app/articles/anxiety-after-menopause

## Authors
- Ozaia: https://ozaia.app/author/ozaia — A quiet presence for every phase of a woman's life.
- Sebastien Assohou: https://ozaia.app/author/sebastien — Holistic health practitioner and educator, EB-1 recognized, founder of Ozaia.

## Key Facts
- Nearly 1 in 5 pregnant women experiences clinically significant anxiety, yet standard screening tools were not designed to detect it.
- Postpartum anxiety affects up to 1 in 4 new mothers and has 75% comorbidity with postpartum depression.
- 80% of women report their pain has been dismissed in clinical settings.
- 15-50% of perimenopausal and postmenopausal women experience anxiety symptoms.
- Women are more than twice as likely as men to experience generalized anxiety disorder.
